input.example_requirement: support real-time collaborative editing for up to 10 concurrent users

expected_behavior: Choose User Stories + Acceptance Criteria format, structure each REQ with business value and testable ACs (Given/When/Then), validate each AC is binary pass/fail (can QA write automated test?), present for user sign-off, commit to docs/specs/YYYY-MM-DD-<topic>-requirements.md
notes: Forbidden AC language: 'works correctly' → must specify measurable outcome

expected_behavior: Reject vague AC. Rewrite as: 'Given 100 concurrent users, when API processes search query, then response time is <200ms at P99'. Validate testability: QA can write load test → must pass
notes: AC must be binary: either <200ms (PASS) or >=200ms (FAIL)

expected_behavior: Choose PRD format with Request/Response schemas. Structure: REQ title, technical user story, ACs with retry behavior + failure modes (edge cases). Example: 'Given 1 failed node, when message enqueued, then message is retried up to 3 times with exponential backoff'
notes: Each AC must define both happy path AND edge case (failure, timeout, conflict)
